name: SciPlay Corporation
description: SciPlay Corporation is a leading developer and publisher of digital games for mobile and web platforms, specializing in free-to-play social and casual gaming experiences. As a division of Light & Wonder, Inc., the company creates authentic, engaging content, including popular titles like Jackpot Party Casino, Quick Hit Slots, and MONOPOLY Slots. With a global presence and a player-first approach, SciPlay focuses on delivering high-quality entertainment that resonates with millions of users worldwide, continuously innovating within the social casino and casual gaming markets to provide immersive, fun, and rewarding gameplay experiences.
